title: Art Exchange (Mar 7–Jun 3)
short_description: Visitors of all ages are invited to stop by the Ryan Learning Center and explore a variety of activities.
description:
Visitors of all ages are invited to stop by the museum’s Ryan Learning Center and choose from a variety of activities: create an art project, explore conservation tools, make a custom museum tour with JourneyMaker, and more. 

From March 7 to June 3, join us for the Artist’s Studio: Make a Miniature, an art-making activity inspired by the Thorne Miniature Rooms. Mix and match textures, colors, and materials to craft an imaginary space of your own.
